# Hyperbeam

## Docs

- [Examples](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/client-sdk/javascript/examples.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/client-sdk/javascript/overview.md)
- [Reference](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/client-sdk/javascript/reference.md)
- [Unity Desktop Application SDK](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/client-sdk/unity/unity-desktop-sdk.md)
- [Hyperbeam.cs](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/client-sdk/unity/webgl/hyperbeam.md)
- [HyperbeamController.cs](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/client-sdk/unity/webgl/hyperbeam-controller.md)
- [WebGL Overview](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/client-sdk/unity/webgl/overview.md)
- [Authenticating Participants](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/guides/authenticating-participants.md): Granting access to cloud computers
- [Install Custom Chrome Extension](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/guides/install-chrome-extension.md)
- [Persist Session State](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/guides/persist-session-state.md)
- [Resize Browser Window](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/guides/resize-browser-window.md): Learn how to set and resize the dimensions of the browser window dynamically.
- [Roles](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/guides/roles.md)
- [Timeouts](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/guides/timeouts.md)
- [Examples](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/home/examples.md): Open source examples
- [FAQ](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/home/faq.md): Frequently asked questions from the Hyperbeam community
- [Features](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/home/features.md): What you can do with Hyperbeam
- [Getting Started](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/home/getting-started.md): Create a virtual computer
- [Introduction](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/home/introduction.md): Welcome to Hyperbeam's documentation portal 👋
- [Dispatch Endpoints](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/dispatch/dispatch-overview.md): Initiate a virtual machine instance
- [Ending a Session](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/dispatch/ending-session.md)
- [Get Single Session](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/dispatch/get-session.md)
- [Get Active Sessions](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/dispatch/get-sessions.md)
- [Get Usage](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/dispatch/get-usage.md)
- [Starting a Android Emulator](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/dispatch/start-android-emulator-session.md): Initiate a Android Emulator using Hyperbeam
- [Starting a Chromium Session](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/dispatch/start-chromium-session.md): Initiate a Chromium browser using Hyperbeam
- [Starting a Console Emulator](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/dispatch/start-console-emulator-session.md): Initiate a Console Emulator using Hyperbeam
- [Add Roles](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/session/add-roles.md)
- [Set Bookmarks](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/session/bookmarks.md)
- [Remove Roles](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/session/remove-roles.md)
- [Removing Users](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/session/removing-users.md)
- [Session Endpoints](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/session/session-overview.md): Programmatically control a cloud computer session from your backend
- [Set User Permissions](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/rest-api/session/set-user-permission.md)

## OpenAPI Specs

- [package](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/package.json)
- [package-lock](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/package-lock.json)
- [.prettierrc](https://docs.hyperbeam.com/.prettierrc.json)
